briefs.title: BC Sick Note Rules Tightened: Employers Cannot Request Notes for Short Absences
briefs.summary: BC's new Employment Standards rules ban employers from asking for a doctor's note when an employee takes 5 or fewer consecutive sick days, up to twice per calendar year. More health professionals now qualify to write valid sick notes.
briefs.action_required: Update your sick leave and doctor's note policy to stop requesting notes for absences of 5 days or fewer (up to twice per year).

key_dates.label: BC sick note restriction rules take effect
